title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 94.050 - No exemptions from tax
text:
94.050.  No exemptions from tax. — The city council shall have no power to relieve any person from the payment of any tax, or exempt any person from any burden imposed by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 6938) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6792; 1919 § 8279; 1909 § 9216
